meaning: n.(尤指与飞机前进方向相反者)气流
examples: A rather cold north west airstream will cover our province.
The ramp sits at an acute Angle to deflect the intake airstream from the longitudinal direction.
Since all the probes and vanes are exposed to the airstream, internal heating is provided to prevent ice formation.
Brett Hall, owner of Timeless Trailers, says prices for his custom overhauls of Airstream trailers vary.
For a few Airstream fans, Mr. Wheeler's efforts at pushing the boundaries simply aren't enough.
